channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Vance says 'I trust actions' while discussing Iran negotiations
item.description: Vice President JD Vance spoke to reporters on Monday about the status of peace talks with Iran as he prepared to depart Switzerland. He emphasized that trust should be based on actions, not words.

item.title: Federal judge dismisses DOJ subpoenas for Tim Walz and other Minnesota officials
item.description: A federal judge has invalidated DOJ subpoenas issued to Minnesota Governor Tim Walz and other officials as part of an investigation into cooperation with federal immigration authorities.

item.title: Judge blocks Trump administration's 'haphazard' voter-screening database
item.description: A judge blocked a Trump administration voter-screening database, calling it a haphazard effort to consolidate private information and purge non-citizens.

item.title: WATCH: The Points Guy offers summer travel tips
item.description: Brian Kelly, the Points Guy, shares advice on how to maximize your summer travel experience.
